title: Spike: evaluate agentic workflow framework for OCR pipeline
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/92

Evaluate lightweight agentic frameworks for region-adaptive OCR. Constraints: deterministic I/O, no open-ended loops, typed steps. Use case: load region spec → adapt prompt → route model → validate schema.

**Depends on:** Multi-provider patterns established (Claude integration).
**Deliverable:** Framework comparison + recommendation.
